choral.def: 合唱的、由合唱團演奏的人的人物
choral.ex: The church is famous for its beautiful traditional choral music.

chorale.def: 對位讚美詩、合唱的人物 (單數)
chorale.ex: The student learned to play a famous Bach chorale today.

chord.def: (樂)和弦、弦、(拉、心)心弦人物 (單數)
chord.col: strike a chord (引起共嗚), piano chord
chord.ex: The speech managed to strike a deep chord with the audience.

chore.def: 瑣事、零工、令人討厭的工作人物 (單數)
chore.ex: Shopping for groceries is a daily chore that she enjoys.

choreograph.def: 編舞、設計動作的人的人、設計地 (舞)
choreograph.ex: He was hired to choreograph a new modern ballet tonight.

choreographer.ex: The leading choreographer spent months training the dancers.

choreographic.def: 編舞的、舞譜的人的人物
choreographic.ex: The performance was praised for its bold choreographic design.

choreography.ex: The musical won an award for its truly brilliant choreography.

chorister.ex: The young cathedral chorister had a truly angelic voice.

choroid.ex: The choroid is the thin vascular layer between the retina.

chortle.def: 得意地笑、呵呵笑的人的人、笑地 (笑)
chortle.ex: A loud chortle escaped him as he read the funny comic strip.

chorus.def: 合唱團、歌舞隊、副歌、齊聲、齊聲說的人物、合唱地 (合唱)
chorus.col: in chorus, dawn chorus (黎明鳥鳴), chorus girl
chorus.ex: The entire room began to sing the catchy chorus altogether.

chosen.def: 被選中的、精選的人的人 (或物) (選)
chosen.col: chosen field, many are called but few are chosen
chosen.ex: She is well-respected for her long work in her chosen field.

chough.ex: The red-billed chough is a rare bird found on rocky cliffs.

chow.def: (俚)伙食、吃、鬆獅犬的人人物 (食)
chow.ex: Let's find some good local place to chow down after movie.

chowder.ex: New England clam chowder is a very popular winter dish.

chrism.ex: The holy chrism was used during the baby's baptism today.

christen.def: 施洗、命名、第一次使用的人的人、命名地 (命)
christen.ex: They decided to christen the baby boy after his grandfather.

christening.def: 洗禮、命名禮的人 (或物) (洗)
christening.ex: The baby wore a beautiful white silk gown for her christening.

christian.def: 基督教的、基督徒、仁慈的、文明的人人物 (信)
christian.ex: Compassion is a fundamental value of the Christian faith.

christianity.ex: The report examines the history and spread of Christianity.

christianize/christianise.def: 使基督教化的人的人、教化地 (化)
christianize/christianise.ex: The kings tried to christianize the entire nation by law.

christmas.col: christmas tree, christmas eve, merry christmas
christmas.ex: The children are excited about opening their Christmas gifts.

chromatic.def: 顏色的、(樂)半音階的人的人物
chromatic.ex: The student practiced playing the chromatic scale on piano.

chromatography.ex: Gas chromatography is used to separate complex mixtures.

chrome.def: 鉻、鍍鉻、鉻黃色、鍍鉻的人的人物、鍍鉻地 (鉻)
chrome.ex: The old vintage car has a lot of bright chrome detailing.

chromium.ex: Chromium is a very hard metal used for plating other metals.

chromosome.ex: Each human cell contains forty-six different chromosomes.

chronic.def: 慢性的、長期的、習慣性的、(英)極壞的人的人物 (恆)
chronic.col: chronic pain, chronic illness, chronic problem
chronic.ex: He has been suffering from chronic back pain for ten years.

chronically.ex: The hospital provides care for the chronically ill patients.

chronicle.def: 編年史、編年紀錄、紀錄、載入、載入的人的人物、記錄地 (紀)
chronicle.ex: The book is a fascinating chronicle of the city's history.

chronicler.def: 記錄者、編年史作者 (單數)
chronicler.ex: He has been a faithful chronicler of local events for years.

chronograph.def: 發條表、計時器人物 (單數)
chronograph.ex: The luxury chronograph is accurate to a tenth of a second.

chronological.def: 按時間順序的人的人物
chronological.ex: Please arrange all the ancient documents in chronological order.

chronologically.ex: The events of the war are listed chronologically in the book.

chronology.def: 年代學、時間表、順序的人物 (單數)
chronology.ex: Historians have established a detailed chronology of the era.

chronometer.def: 精密計時器、航海表人物 (單數)
chronometer.ex: The marine chronometer was essential for finding longitude.

chrysalis.def: 蛹、蛹殼、預備階段人物 (單數)
chrysalis.ex: A butterfly finally emerged from its green and gold chrysalis.

chrysanthemum.ex: Yellow chrysanthemums are traditional symbols of the fall.

chubby.def: 圓胖的、豐滿的人人物 (胖)
chubby.ex: The healthy baby boy had very cute and chubby red cheeks.
